Start Chatting
Now with Forma constraints

The AI that actually listens.

Instant, intelligent chat. Built with 31 semantic tokens and 32 reusable blocks. Zero design drift.

Try the demo See the manifest
Product preview
Capabilities

What you can do today

Same power as ChatGPT, now built with perfect design contracts.

01 Real-time answers

Ask anything. Get thoughtful replies in seconds.

02 Code & analysis

Write, debug, and explain code instantly.

03 Creative sparks

Brainstorm ideas, write stories, or generate images.

→ Flexible Layouts

Multiple variants per block let you mix and match without writing custom CSS.

→ Drop-In Ready

Works with any stack — plain HTML, React, Vue, Astro, whatever you're building with.

→ Dark Mode Native

CSS token architecture makes dark mode a first-class citizen, not an afterthought.

Real Manifest

This is the site.json that built this page

Every page you're looking at was compiled from a manifest like this. No templates. No page builder. Just JSON and a compile command.

site.json Live manifest 
{
  "forma_version": "2.0.0",
  "site": {
    "name": "Forma",
    "domain": "forma-demo.fly.dev"
  },
  "theme": "bone-and-ink",
  "goal": "lead_generation",
  "pages": {
    "index": {
      "title": "Forma — The Design Layer of the Agent Web",
      "blocks": [
        { "id": "nav" },
        { "id": "hero",
          "title": "Stop generating HTML. Start declaring intent.",
          "cta_primary_text": "View on GitHub" },
        { "id": "pipeline" },
        { "id": "before-after" },
        { "id": "feature-grid" },
        { "id": "code-preview" },
        { "id": "stats" },
        { "id": "testimonials" },
        { "id": "cta" },
        { "id": "footer" }
      ]
    }
  },
  "constraints": {
    "max_blocks_per_page": 12,
    "required_blocks": ["nav", "hero", "cta", "footer"]
  }
}
node compile.site.js site.json dist/ — that's the whole build step.
The Pipeline

From intent to production in one command

01
Agent Intent
"Build a lead-gen site for a design tool. Dark theme. 4 pages."
→
02
site.json
Theme, pages, blocks, content, goal, audience — all in one manifest.
→
03
Compile
Blocks pulled, tokens applied, content injected. Static HTML out.
→
04
Forma Judge
Schema validated. Goal rules checked. 28/28 passed. Ship it.
Real users

"

Finally an AI interface that looks as good as it thinks.

SC

Sarah Chen

Product Designer, Independent

"

The manifest-to-page pipeline is exactly what agent workflows needed. Ship once, theme forever.

DT

Dev Team

Engineering, Forma Users

"

I changed one line in the manifest and the entire site re-themed. That is how design systems should work.

DS

Designer

UI/UX, Agency
